title: Integrated Marketing Services — 'MorningStars' Kids' Cereal National Launch (India)

general_information.background: Nutriva Foods is launching 'MorningStars', a new fortified kids' breakfast cereal, into the Indian market in Q3 2026. This is a flagship national launch with significant above-the-line and digital investment. We are seeking a lead agency (or consortium) to deliver integrated strategy, creative, production, and media services.
general_information.objective: Appoint a vendor to deliver an end-to-end launch campaign that builds awareness among parents and appeal among children aged 4–9, while remaining fully compliant with Indian advertising standards for food and children's advertising.
general_information.contact: Priya Nair, Category Procurement Lead — procurement@nutrivafoods.example

line_items.name: Strategy and creative development
line_items.scope: Brand positioning, launch communication strategy, big creative idea, key visual, and master messaging framework for parents and kids audiences.

line_items.name: TVC development
line_items.scope: Concepting and pre-production of one 30-second hero TVC plus two 10-second cutdowns, including scripts, storyboards, and director's treatment.

line_items.name: TVC production
line_items.scope: Full production of the approved hero TVC and cutdowns, including shoot, talent (incl. child artists), post-production, and delivery in broadcast and digital formats.

line_items.name: Social organic content
line_items.scope: Always-on organic content for Instagram, YouTube, and Facebook for the first 3 months post-launch — content calendar, asset creation, and community management.

line_items.name: Social paid media planning
line_items.scope: Paid social and digital media strategy and plan across Meta, YouTube, and programmatic, with audience targeting, channel mix, and forecasted reach/frequency.

line_items.name: Social paid media buying and optimization
line_items.scope: Execution, buying, and ongoing optimization of the paid media plan for the first 3 months, including weekly reporting and budget pacing.
line_items.requested_unit: % of media spend OR fixed management fee (state clearly)

line_items.name: Kids advertising and claims compliance review
line_items.scope: Independent review of all creative and claims for compliance with ASCI guidelines on advertising to children and food/nutrition claims, including documented sign-off.

line_items.name: Launch program management
line_items.scope: End-to-end program management across all workstreams — timeline, stakeholder coordination, status reporting, and risk management through to go-live.

commercial_expectations.pricing_format: Vendors must provide a per-line-item price breakdown in INR. Lump-sum-only bids without itemisation may be marked non-compliant.
commercial_expectations.tax_clarity: All prices must explicitly state whether GST (18%) is included or excluded. Ambiguity on tax will be treated as a gap.
commercial_expectations.payment_terms: Buyer's standard terms are 30/40/30 (mobilisation / mid-milestone / on delivery). Vendors may propose alternatives with justification.
must_be_inclusive_of: Standard revisions (up to 2 rounds per deliverable)

vendor_questionnaire: Describe your relevant experience launching food or kids' products in India in the last 3 years, with named examples.
Who are the named team members and what is their relevant experience?
What is your process for ensuring ASCI compliance for advertising directed at children?
How do you substantiate nutrition/health claims used in creative?
State your assumptions regarding client-provided assets, approvals, and turnaround times.
State explicitly what is excluded from your pricing (e.g. media spend, talent, licensing).
What is your proposed timeline from appointment to go-live, with key milestones?

compliance_requirements.requirement: All creative directed at children must comply with ASCI Guidelines for Advertising to Children, including no encouragement of excessive consumption and no undermining of healthy lifestyles.
All health/nutrition claims must be substantiated and compliant with FSSAI advertising and claims regulations; vendor must document substantiation.
Any production using child artists must comply with applicable child labour and welfare regulations for shoots.
Any data collection in digital campaigns targeting families must comply with applicable Indian data protection requirements.
